known_facts: The agent creates Task Execution Pack artifacts for downstream coding agents.
Machine-readable JSON files are the source of truth.
The agent must not execute user business code.
assumptions: The downstream agent can read local Markdown and JSON files.

artifacts.purpose: Source of truth for package status, facts, artifacts, gates, waivers, and release recommendation.
Human-readable task context, goals, non-goals, assumptions, and success criteria.
Agile value plan with backlog, user stories, DoR, DoD, review, and retro.
Execution contract for downstream coding agents.
Tool permission, side effect, failure, retry, rollback, and audit contract.
Evaluation and release gate cases, including negative cases.
Role-owned decision log with challenges, evidence, decisions, impacted artifacts, and regression risks.
Human review summary for package readiness.
Governance review for schema, fixture, script, test, and release readiness.
Index of package artifacts and release recommendation.
